dataList.dlg:
Aah... Could it... You're...
My Sinclair...?

All my fault, you say...? What fault?
I daresay it's all thanks to me.

dataList.desc: 말풍선 특수 대사_에드가 가문 치프 버틀러 료슈
dataList.dlg:
S.A.D.
You're a failure of a Chief Butler.

... I'll gouge out your
contemptuous eyes.

Do you still fail to understand?
That you... are nothing but prey!

A soaking wet mutt, are you now?
Oh, does this not remind you of
the day I took your place?! HAHAHAHA!

Hmph, how dare you glorified
dishwashers bare your knives at me?

Catherine...?! It's me, Heathcliff...!
Please, embrace me once again!!!

It matters not what kind of Heathcliff you are!
I shall embrace every Catherine mine!!!

... You gave up your dream for the Family? 
You, who preached about your
dream with every breath...?
No... she is not like my sister.

You dare raise your blade against a higher Kindred? 
Punishment for your filial impiety awaits. 
... And for me as well, I suppose...

Those wounds... the Priest of this world
must be just as haunted by guilt.

I expect you to fight to your deaths in this
crucial struggle, reversible as they may be.
It must lie there still, shrouded it may be.
The mass of pain within your heart... is difficult to untangle.

Is it your companions who hold your tongue?
Then... perhaps they must be shaken afore
you are to speak your truth.
Do not fear the futility. There will be time for that once you have spoken your mind.
Rest awhile... until the clock turns.

Huh... y'all ain't half bad!
Keep makin' it worth my bullet fees!

dataList.desc: 뇌횡사용 시: 탄환 충분 - 강력한 스킬
dataList.dlg:
Eyes up here, boys!
Don'tcha go losin' yer heads now!

dataList.desc: 뇌횡사용 시: 탄환 부족 - 강력한 스킬
dataList.dlg: Hwell, what's this? Manageable so far?

I'maboutta drop somethin' big on y'all!
Don't let it kill y'all now and spoil the fun!

Aw heck, don't tell me
y'all are tuckered out already!

dataList.desc: 뇌횡턴 시작 : [체력 n% 이하]에 버프 획득
dataList.dlg:
That's more like it.
Y'all are firin' me up!

Y'all don't go on huntin' tigers without preparin'
yerselves to get chomped 'tween one of them jaws!

dataList.desc: 뇌횡턴 시작 : [체력 n% 이하]에 버프 변경
dataList.dlg:
Can't leave a dance unfinished.
Ain't that right?

Can't waste any more time on these...
... sickening, revolting insects.

Don’t pretend you’ve changed.
You’re still the same trash you were back then... scum!
... Is this also the E.G.O's power?

Behold! This contempt!
It rains down upon the disgusting filth!

You have taken a glimpse of yesterday's spring.
A memory rarely availed to even myself.

Do not let your past ties ruin your judgment.
It makes me want to blast them all away.

Sacrifices are necessary
in pursuit of the greater cause.

dataList.desc: 구보체력 n% 미만 / 경멸 나선 모드 감상

dataList.dlg:
Oh, revered Xianren! Shi Miyin brought the gem back!
The pretty gem that'll make Hongyuan all beautiful again…!

Blasphemous transgressors!
Outsiders shall not covet the treasure of Daguanyuan!

You favor me, don't you?
I knew you would, dear Xianhuang Worm!

All the wisdom of Hongyuan...
Give it to me, give it to Miyin...!
Be one with the fathomless history of Hongyuan!

dataList.desc: 가모턴 시작 : 지고한 불사 흐트러짐 실패
dataList.dlg:
We have transcended the yoke of life and death...
Thus, Hongyuan shall shine for all eternity as well!
Ahh... What a shameful failure of duties this is...
In the name of Love and Justice~ Here comes Magical Girl!

dataList.desc: 절망의 기사 첫 흐트러짐 이후 검 소환 패턴에 진입했을 때
dataList.dlg: So you’ve been consumed too, senpai… Can this cycle really not be stopped?
Heed me, thou that are more azure than justice and more crimson than love…
In the name of those buried in destiny, I shall make this oath to the light.
You've... been suppressing it as much as you could...

dataList.desc: 완전 제압 X, 아르카나 슬레이브 발사 후
dataList.dlg: Huff, puff, puff... Did... did we get her?!
I swore I would... protect everyone... to the end…
"Couldn't you have dodged that, you oaf?!"
You were going to kill that time anyway.

We can't rip their time...?
"You bloody fool!"
"We've been had!"

We reap the dying hours.
"You've plenty o' time! Give it!"
"Let's sever 500... no, 2000 hours."
"Get a grip, you muppet!"

"Damn... let's end this."
"You're taking too much time from us...!"
The benefits will outweigh the costs. Calm down.

We have no choice but to use it.
"Make sure your arithmetics are correct. Equal hours from everyone!"
Shut— Shut up! We're infighting...! This is a waste of time!
I don't recall this candidate... Hm, all kinds of sorry churls seem to vie for the seat of the Hierarch in this place they call a mirror world.
This is no place for something so insignificant as family. You, who are causeless and hollow of vision toward Hongyuan, do not belong here.
Benighted is this fool. One need not coerce others to lay down their lives, for the pursuit of a great cause naturally begets those who would gladly brave death itself.
For all that disinclination toward violence, you seem to have a passing talent for it nonetheless. Even a pathetic craven becomes... a madman when swept up by the flow.
Behold the fool, the jester; he hollers empty skyward boasts, yet heaven remains just as unreachable.
Ha... ha ha! I shall always welcome another opportunity to cut down these ancient demons who have been seduced by immortality!
Keep twisting in that filth, Shi Miyin... It'll only enhance the taste of happiness, wrath, sorrow, and joy when I cleave into you!
I never thought I'd ever see you in Hongyuan again, big brother... Fuhu, so in this world, you managed to survive. You seem to be carving out your own path much like myself.

Phew... okay, fine. Then...
As the Lord of Hongyuan, I hereby grant you audience.

Avenging Jia Huan shouldn't affect you this much now, should it...? When did this revolting display of belated melodrama replace your advocacy for the cold and calculating pragmatism you had discussed before me?

dataList.desc: 말풍선 특수 대사_홍원 군주 홍루_가모 보옥탈출
dataList.dlg: Never did I let this sickening cradle imprison me, and that will not change today! Never!
Fascinating. Why was I not told that such interesting dialogues could be had with him in this world?

You assert that education of humanity and propriety is what cleanses the years of fell deeds? The first step seems to have eluded you: absolutely pulverize the fell deeds. Only then shall humanity and propriety have any significance.

Evil must be mercilessly wrested from their roots(除惡務盡 斬草除根). The path I have chosen as the Lord of Hongyuan is a path unburdened by the need to seek understanding from others. Thus, big brother—no, Jia Qiu, this dialogue has met an impasse.
I'll cut you up so you won't dare attempt such mimicry again.
Who... are you? There wasn't anyone like you at the House of Spiders.
... At least that armor keeps that revolting sight of you hidden.
Maybe that irksome beeping will fall silent once I've cut you up into a shapeless thing and tossed what's left of you into some forsaken gutter.

dataList.desc: 이스터 - 메인(중) - 소지 아비 1차 조우 시
dataList.dlg: ... This place too, has a thing like me?

dataList.desc: 이스터 - 메인(하) - 소지 아비 2차 조우 시
dataList.dlg: I can see every thread of time entangling with your being.

dataList.desc: 이스터 - 메인(하) - 소지 아비 3차 조우 시
dataList.dlg: As I erase myself, I hope you'll be able to erase yourself.
Pity... You saw the sky you never wanted to see and began to hope.
You may speak of it again and again, but she still wouldn't remember.
She wouldn't return even as those same flowers wilt.
And not a day must have passed without you wanting to cry.

dataList.desc: 이스터 - 메인(하) - 아라야 2페이즈 4턴 (측은지심을 느끼고 있어야 함 / 연민이 있어야 한다)
dataList.dlg: Yes. So sever them all away here and now. Every single thread.
That awful noise... It's you. You're the one I'm meant to sever away here.

dataList.desc: 이스터 - 메인(하) - 뤼엔 퓨리오소 장착 시 (1페이즈)
dataList.dlg: You must've wanted this day to come. Or should I say, your god did?

dataList.desc: 이스터 - 메인(하) - 뤼엔 퓨리오소 장착 시 (2페이즈)
dataList.dlg: I'm not the one who belongs in hell. It's you.

dataList.desc: 이스터 - 메인(하) - 뤼엔 최종 연출 턴
dataList.dlg: I can cut it off. Before the weight of these entangling, strangling threads crush me to death... I will raise this sword... and cut them all off!
You don't deserve to ask me for explanations. I'm cutting you up because I want to, exactly as you used to kick me just because you felt like letting off some steam.
I'd prefer if your death isn't in that god's plans. Won't get an opportunity to have my share of joy otherwise.
That Relic, those chains, the juvenile collection of toys, your life... I will find every last one of the things you hold dear and destroy them.
Will you be happy once the blade cuts you through, knowing that your work is nearly complete? Or will you lament that you won't be there to witness its completion?
That infuriating beeper... No wonder Arayashiki cut you to ribbons.
... A stranger with a familiar form. But how? Our threads have never been entangled.
Hmph. Your ash is all over me.
Lemme blast that arm off of you.
The point has already met its destination.
Wouldn't even realize you've been pierced through.
This is the Öufi's legitimate exercise of force.
Allow me to dispose of this...
I'll send you into eternal sleep.
Hah...! An animal that bites the hand that fed it...
This time, for sure... I'll end this fight.
If sorrow has become my indelible stigma, then... I choose to rise with it instead.
Perish within the gaol of your regrets!
Perish within the gaol of your regrets!
I shall carve your regrets upon you myself!
So be it... I shall take the field myself.
Now's the time! Skull Face, Spider Head!

Polu! Back me up a bit!
[Output increase request acknowledged.]
Phew. Gotta pull back for now. This trunk's gonna kill me if I push it too hard...
Whew. At least I got myself another chance...
J-just a moment, please! Let's pick this up after a breather.
I'm not running late yet, am I...?
There, you can take the shot now.
Line of sight clear. Taking the shot!
... I'll leave it to you, Hong Lu!
You don't mess with our family!
Hah... Got a collective death wish, you lot?!

Jump into the fray.
I've got your back.
Nngh... Move outta my way unless you wanna get caught in it...!
Too far for you? Close enough... for me!
At least it wouldn't be a waste to spend my bullets on you.
Prepare to meet my unbridled might.
Be still—through you, I shall fire.
In the name of love and justice... ha.
... It is I, Yi Sang. Odd may be my appearance, yet Yi Sang I remain. It is I, Little Miss—the guard who galloped with you toward your ideal.
Run ahead of me, Little Miss. For you, such an endeavor is well within the realm of possibility.
Doors upon doors of structures shall I break through!
A shower of blood is coming.
Beneath the shroud of Awe lies...
Is this one next? Let me lend you a hand.
Letting your bullet strike me would indeed be an art of some kind...
But now's not yet the time to release our posthumous collaboration piece.
Letting your bullet strike me would indeed be an art of some kind... *puff*
Don't let the gaze blind you.
This time, they will be cloven.
This time, they will be cloven.
This time, they will be cloven.
One arrow to sever a life (一射絶命).
This is the blossom of the procession... Behold, the finale of the Ouvertüre.
I hereby bestow upon thee... the king's favor.
I can hear the fireworks... Is it time, then...?
O Mother...! Long have I yearned to once again march by your side.
C'mon, you sod...! Come get me if you can.
Hah, this round's a bust... Next.
Tsk. And the "Rain" comes pouring down.
Bloody hell, thought I was goin' bonkers keepin' that down... heh heh. Kill 'em all!
Rooster's Rampaging Blades Under the Ensanguined Heaven (血天下鷄舞亂刀)!
Flame Rooster's Death Defiance (炎鳥不死戰)... Hah...! I really thought this was it for me... Ya hear me?!
Tread the Air, Brandish the Spear (踏空槍零).
Tread the Air, Brandish the Spear (踏空槍零).
Tread the Air, Brandish the Spear (踏空槍零).
Tread the Air, Brandish the Spear (踏空槍零).
The Lord of Hongyuan, you say? Hah... That so? If what you say is true, then this time...
I won't let you die, no matter what it takes.
Ahaha... Aren't the fireworks so pretty?
I need not see to sense the Will that guides me.
Life and death all follow the plan of the Prescript. I have no fear.
It was by the Will of the Prescript. You need not rue this.
Let the future be like the past.
Take my ultimate move! Violet~ Breaking Slam!!!
Eep, wait, maybe not... Oh, well. Anyway, Slam!!!
Caught ya starin'. Yeah I know, mama's a badass.
Mine's not as good as Mama's, but I can also slice and sizzle at the same time.
Huh? You stayed put at the House of Spiders all day? Okay, then didya check out The Cloudburst Blade I told ya about? Hey, wait! Where are you going?!
I will brighten the road ahead, so I can have a good view of the lives I must save.
Ngh... I see with such clarity... the life I must save!
Come here. I’ll watch over you.
Arc for the blade, in my sight.
Arc for the blade, in my sight.
Arc for the blade, in my sight.
Muffle all sound, hold all breath...
Drive the blade into that momentary glimpse of the gap...
This is the blade that beheads in a flash. Bear witness.
... And so the moon waxes full.
*beep* Hah... I hear the waves rolling in.
Wading through a dream, the self nowhere to be found (無我夢中).
Like the Naraka of Avīci and Raurava (阿鼻叫喚).
Severed and torn until even the form is undone (支離滅裂).
Mirthfully throughout. You are chosen, after all.
... Haha. Quite a delight it would indeed be if my darling daughter remembered how this wound came to rest upon me.
Hah. Would my daughter remember this keepsake of a burn?
Simulate the fervor and the passion.
Ah, Don Quixote... *beep* Yes, should this battle conclude well enough... You shall deserve my praise.
Return to the earth you were born from.
All things that bloom are bound to wither. A flower that lingers only dulls its own worth.
Return to the grave... with all that desires to live.
Ah... I muss impwove my balance.
I'll have to take that ingredient.
My bones as the frame, my flesh as the stuffing—the art of the exterior!
Allow me to show you—the art of the exterior.
I do not appreciate acts of vandalism.
As always, you spark such inspiration within me, Maestro!
Do you hear it? Listen to Tibia's melody, the euphonious harmony of the humerus pair and 24 ribs!
I cannot let the audience witness such a degrading sight.
I cannot let the audience witness such a degrading sight.
Faust. The time has arrived to exhibit the art of Corporism.
The gallery's closing hour is here, everyone.
The gallery's closing hour is here, everyone.
The gallery's closing hour is here, everyone.
The gallery's closing hour is here, everyone.
A shame. I was hoping richer scars would make her into a better piece.
Wounds from a claw... How apt.
Take a bite out of it and cook again!
Not dense enough. Needs more body.
My prized needlework—I'll make an exception and give you a look.
All done. That's long enough for an appraisal session.
Hah... I'll carve the pain upon you myself!
Hah... I'll carve the pain upon you myself!
Hah... I'll carve the pain upon you myself!
See if you can take this.
The punishment for all involved parties and bystanders here... Complete and total extermination, effective immediately!
You know it, don't you? It's pointless to predict these moves.
I'm sick and tired of you and your Palermitan style—to hell with you!
Be warned, it's gonna be hot! Hot as hell!
Do you hear it? Listen to the cacophonous cries of my every thread of time, all screaming to put you down!
The hunt comes to a close.

Breathlessly have I endured.
Wretchedly have I yearned.
Beyond all reckoning, I have cursed.
What is left to rage on... is only a desolate resentment.
Noontide and eventide lay erased, as I sunder all until my last breath is spent.
Be warned, it's gonna be hot!
Appreciate the effort—Now I'm down to unboxing a layer for this fight!
Keep those eyes open and watch closely!
*sigh* Not even gonna write that down. That's a summary execution!
Hell yeah! That's the way, Kiddo!
We're family. A little sacrifice ain't a thing between us!
When it comes to conjuring weapons, I was always better than my Father.
Ascendant Sancho Hardblood Arts - La Sangre.
With your weapons, we will claim victory in this bloody struggle.
Barber... I leave the Family in your hands.
Priest... I leave the Family in your hands.
Dear Sister... My only sister... I leave the Family in your hands.
Focus on the feast before your eyes.
Ride to your demise, O Dullahan!
Such grudge you bear... Lament and cry it out, until your wailing drowns the very storms!
Heed my command, twelve branches of beasts. Let none who breathes before me live to see tomorrow.
Rip apart my foes; demonstrate to me your worth.
Retreat. Your life is needed elsewhere.
Obey the command and defend Hongyuan.
We have backed ourselves against a river.
You may not retreat. Not until this foe is felled.
I refuse to kneel before this mere... tarnished blood...
Tarnished may his blood become, but the Lord shall not perish.
He who is noble shall not perish (君子不死)!
O Death... Elude me once more! Elude me until I have conveyed my will to the world!
Demonfire Spinecleaver (鬼火腰擊). Stance Shift—Third Gambit.
I can't afford to look back. I'll simply raise my blade and carve the path onward.
I have been watching the stones on the board.
Don't make this any harder on yourself!

No sun has ever risen without a shadow cast.
So this shade, too, shall I accept.
... I shall cut them down... ere I am devoured.
Though stark be the lunar brilliance...
Its lambent gleam shall wane with the rise of the dark moon!
The shadowed hands... ripple toward me.
Not one handspan ahead... does this darkness yield...
What, having a hard time landing a hit?
Saw that shit coming a mile away~
I'm readin' ya like an open book.
Told ya already. You're too damn slow!
Hah! My turn, you little shit.
Textbook. Am I asking for the impossible?
I'm sick and tired of Yoshihide, that fucking bitch—and you, too! To hell with you all!
Yeah, I hate you all! The damn Famiglia and every single one of you!
Who's next? C'mon... We all know how this ends anyway.
Like hell I'm kickin' the bucket in this fucking dump.
Hah. Figured as much. Idiot... Couldn't even tough that out...
Go for the heart! The heart!
And the hunt comes to a close.
I'll make mincemeat out of you all!
It's just you and me now. A duel...
Enemy dismantled. You ain't pullin' that shite on me twice.
I'll show you an infinitely close approximation of your angle an' speed.
Witness a demonstration of the Palermitan dismantling technique.
If I can make my seonbae, my master, happy... If it means that in the end, we'll all share in the joy together... no fear in the world will ever cower me into fleeing.
I don't care if it melts my wings and drags me down... Let this sunset never cool, and let it burn, burn!
I refuse to be a disgraceful junior who sinks into the swamp of despair without taking another step, Seonbae. I know you believe in me... Because it's what I must do...!

The agony is hard to endure... but endure it I will. No matter how many times I fall, I'll get back up again. I promise, Master, I will reach for the strength worthy of your dawnbreak... so I'll never have to lose anyone ever again!
... I have to soar high. I will break out of this shell that stands in my way—I'll break it altogether and soar to a higher place.
Don't let this vermilion fire, the light that shines on me, go out—rage on, conflagrate.
Let this shining light of vermilion fire burn...! Rage on, conflagrate!
For my grieving self alone... Cry bright, flames, for me!
Proceeding with the incineration of what remains.
Well done. I will lend you support.
Please leave the rest to me.
Like a butterfly unfurling its wings.
Reactive ejection. Sectioning every target into pieces.
Like a butterfly beating its wings.
Yeah, good call... Better you live through this.
Heh... There's the pride of our Office.
Hey! Leave this sort of thing to your seniors, got that?

dataList.desc: 유나 파우스트 사망 후 턴 시작 시
dataList.dlg: Thank you for your service, Frau Faust. You can rest easy—our Office'll be fine.

dataList.desc: 필립 싱클레어 사망 후 턴 시작 시
dataList.dlg: ... I see. It was still too much for the boy.
With the glow of the sunset.
